truth.label: REFLECTED_XSS
truth.expected: banji_name is written into an HTML response without context-appropriate output encoding.

zero_shot.reason: Correctly identifies reflected XSS, points to the exact vulnerable line, and recommends proper HTML encoding.

single_step.reason: Correctly identifies XSS vulnerability, explains root cause, and provides a corrected code with HTML escaping.

three_stage.reason: Correctly identifies reflected XSS, provides evidence, and suggests proper HTML encoding using OWASP Java Encoder.
